pr.title: Record: Packed N-gram + Two-Pass   Dirichlet CTW — val_bpb 0.0830 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Pre-compute packed order-2-13 n-gram artifact with phrase cache, then two-pass eval with hierarchical Dirichlet CTW mixing to fully warm the cache.
techniques: Packed order-2-13 n-gram artifact and phrase cache prebuilt from training data
Two-pass sliding-window eval that rescoring all tokens after warming cache
Hierarchical Dirichlet CTW mixing feeding each order’s posterior into the next prior
